chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C. P. No. S-400 of 2025 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection flag ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 03-11-2025 Mr. Khadim Hussain Khoso, Advocate a/w petitioners. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant A.G. Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, D.P.G for the State. ************** Learned Assistant Advocate General files comments/statement on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4, which are taken on record. Copies thereof have been supplied to the learned counsel for the petitioners. Petitioner’s counsel submits that petitioner No.1 has contracted a free-will marriage with petitioner No.2. It is further contended that the official respondents, at the instance of the private respondents, are causing harassment to the petitioners. Conversely, the official respondents, in their comments/statement, have denied the allegations leveled against them and stated that neither have they harassed the petitioners nor do they intend to do so in future. They have, however, undertaken to provide protection to the petitioners as and when required in accordance with law. Learned Assistant Advocate General submits that the official respondents are duty-bound to act strictly in accordance with law and shall ensure protection to the petitioners, if and when required. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of with the directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law; they shall ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners; and they shall provide protection to the petitioners as and when required, strictly in accordance with law.

Learned Assistant Advocate General submits that the official respondents are duty-bound to act strictly in accordance with law and shall ensure protection to the petitioners, if and when required. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of with the directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law; they shall ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners; and they shall provide protection to the petitioners as and when required, strictly in accordance with law. Let a copy of this order be transmitted to the learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh, as well as to the official respondents concerned, for information and necessary compliance. Judge Irshad Ali M/Steno
